title: Verify payment success flow
steps: Create order, initiate payment, validate success callback

title: Verify payment retry does not duplicate settlement
steps: Trigger retry after timeout and check settlement records

steps: Confirm an order and validate notification generation

steps: Submit risky transaction and validate fraud response

title: Verify profile update persistence
steps: Update user profile fields and fetch profile again
